How we got here

Boy meets boy. Boy makes questionable dinner. Boy says yes anyway.

A line or two in your own voice goes here — where you met, the date that shouldn't have worked but did, the moment it stopped being a question. Keep it short and funny; this is the bit people actually read.

Then the proposal: where, who cried first, and how close the ring came to a watery grave. Give them the good version.

— a favourite photo of the two of you —

Dressed up and glamorous — dresses and suits, black tie welcome if that's your vibe. Lean into greens if you're feeling it. Mostly: wear what makes you feel great.
